arts.ttl: How much Celtic will get for Luis Palma as details of 'agreement' with club emerges
arts.sum: From August to December, Palma scored 10 goals and created 10 as he made a positive impact on Celtic’s defence of the Scottish Premiership and impact on the Champions League. Vallecano have an option to buy Palma at the end of the season and if they do, Celtic could earn £2.1m if the Honduran makes his permanent exit in the summer.

arts.ttl: Rodgers: Kyogo happy at Celtic despite speculation over future
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers will not stand in anyone's way if their heart is set on leaving Celtic - but he has detected no restlessness in Kyogo Furuhashi.
